import ast, inspect
src = inspect.getsource(process_sales)
assert '.collect()' in src or 'collect()' in src, 'Must call collect()'
assert 'scan_csv' in src or '.lazy()' in src or 'LazyFrame' in src, 'Must use lazy evaluation'
assert 'group_by' in src or 'groupby' in src, 'Must aggregate by region'
